H2: Transfer Decal FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Transfer Decals

Professional Transfer Decals for Business, Vehicle & Product Applications

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Selection: Choose your transfer decal dimensions Quantity: Select quantity for your custom order Production Time: Select turnaround speed for your transfer decals Upload Design: Upload your artwork file or use our design tool Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Transfer Decals for Custom Applications

Create high-quality custom transfer decals perfect for business signage, vehicle graphics, product labeling, and promotional displays. Our transfer decals are precision-cut from premium vinyl material and include professional transfer tape for clean, precise application on any smooth surface. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Transfer decals feature no background material, allowing your design to appear cleanly applied without visible borders. Each decal includes transfer tape that holds individual design elements in perfect position during application, making it easy to apply complex logos, text, and graphics with professional results.

Available in unlimited custom sizes up to 54 inches wide, our transfer decals work on windows, glass surfaces, vehicles, products, equipment, and smooth interior or exterior applications. Perfect for business branding, vehicle graphics, product identification, and custom hard hat stickers applications.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Decal Order Process & Design Options

Creating custom transfer decals starts with selecting your size and quantity, then choosing between our design tools or uploading your own professional artwork files. Our streamlined ordering process ensures you receive high-quality transfer decals exactly as specified.

Design Process

Design your transfer decals using our online design tool with built-in clipart library, or upload your existing logo and artwork files. For transfer cut applications, vector files in EPS or Adobe Illustrator format ensure the highest quality cutting and weeding precision. Our design interface shows real-time previews of how your transfer decals will appear after cutting and application.

Payment

All transfer decal orders require full payment before production begins. We accept major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your order enters production. Payment confirmation triggers the proof generation process for your custom transfer decals.

Live Order Tracking

Monitor your transfer decal order through every production stage with our Live Order Tracking system. After placing your order, you'll receive a unique tracking number via email that provides real-time updates from file processing through final shipping. Track artwork approval, production progress, quality control, and shipping status for complete visibility into your custom transfer decal order timeline.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production scheduling allows you to choose the turnaround speed that matches your project timeline. Production time begins after artwork approval and payment confirmation, ensuring your transfer decals meet exact specifications before manufacturing begins.

2 Business Day Express Production

Express production delivers your custom transfer decals in just 2 business days after artwork approval. Ideal for urgent projects, trade shows, or time-sensitive installations. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. Same-day rush options available in select cases - contact customer service for emergency transfer decal production.

3 Business Day Standard Production

Our most popular production option balances speed with value. Standard 3-day production handles most custom transfer decal orders efficiently while maintaining precise cutting and quality control. This option includes free standard production with fast enough turnaround for most business and promotional applications.

5 Business Day Saver Production

Choose 5-day production to reduce costs on transfer decal orders without urgent deadlines. This economical option provides the same precision cutting and premium vinyl materials with extended production scheduling. Perfect for planned installations, inventory restocking, or save the date magnets coordination.

Production time covers cutting, weeding, and transfer tape application only. Shipping time is calculated separately based on your selected shipping method and destination. Turnaround begins from completed file upload or approved artwork changes.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Cut Options & Application Methods

Transfer decals use precision cutting technology to create clean graphics without background material. Understanding cut options helps you choose the right method for your specific application and design complexity.

Transfer Cut Process

Transfer cutting involves precision cutting of vinyl material to your exact design specifications, followed by removal of excess vinyl material around and within your design. This "weeding" process leaves only your intended graphics, text, or logos. Professional transfer tape is then applied over the remaining vinyl pieces to hold complex designs in perfect alignment during application.

Transfer cut transfer decals work best for text, logos, and graphics with clear boundaries. The cutting process can handle intricate details, but extremely small elements may require special consideration for successful weeding and application.

Pick Complexity & Pricing

Transfer cut pricing includes 8 standard picks with a maximum of 40 picks per square foot. Additional picks range from $0.02 to $0.04 each depending on complexity and time required. Highly intricate transfer decal designs receive custom quotes based on cutting difficulty and weeding labor requirements.

Simple, open fonts and designs with adequate spacing between elements ensure optimal transfer decal quality and application success. Minimum text height of 1/2 inch and 1/8 inch spacing between design elements maintains structural integrity during weeding and transfer processes. Consider dry erase wall decals for applications requiring frequent updates.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Decal Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Proper artwork preparation ensures your transfer decals cut cleanly and apply smoothly. Understanding file requirements and design guidelines helps you create professional results with precise cutting and clean application.

Preferred File Types

Vector files produce the best results for transfer decal cutting. Adobe Illustrator EPS and PDF files provide precise cut lines and scalable graphics that maintain quality at any size. When submitting vector files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution during processing. Maximum file size accepted is 100MB for all transfer decal artwork.

Additional File Formats

High-resolution raster files are accepted for transfer decal production when vector artwork is unavailable. Submit JPEG, TIFF, and PNG files at 100% scale with sufficient resolution for your final transfer decal size. Raster images may require conversion to vector format for optimal cutting results, particularly for detailed or text-heavy designs.

File Setup Tips

Set up artwork files proportionate to your final transfer decal dimensions. Clearly indicate cut lines for all design elements, especially when combining multiple colors or design layers. Avoid flattening or merging layers in design files, as separate layers help our production team optimize cutting paths and material usage.

Transfer Cut Guidelines

Transfer cutting success depends on proper design spacing and element sizing. Maintain minimum 1/8 inch spacing between characters and design elements. All main strokes, line weights, and design elements should measure at least 1/8 inch wide. Text must be minimum 1/2 inch tall for reliable cutting and weeding. Consider these guidelines when creating designs for custom holographic vinyl material applications.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Decal Shipping & Delivery Information

We offer multiple shipping options to ensure your custom transfer decals arrive safely and on schedule. Shipping time is calculated separately from production time, giving you complete control over your project timeline.

Shipping Methods

Choose from ground shipping, expedited delivery, or overnight options based on your installation deadline. Ground shipping typically delivers transfer decals within 3-7 business days depending on distance from our facility. Expedited options include 2-day and overnight delivery for urgent installations or last-minute project needs.

Shipping Time Expectations

Shipping time begins after your transfer decals complete production and quality control processes. Ground shipping ranges from 1-5 business days depending on destination, while expedited options guarantee delivery within specified timeframes. All transfer decal orders include tracking information for real-time delivery monitoring.

Important Shipping Notes

Transfer decals ship in protective packaging designed to prevent damage during transit. Large transfer decal orders may ship in multiple packages or tubes depending on size and quantity. International shipping is available with extended delivery times and potential customs considerations. For projects coordinating with other promotional items like custom paper roll labels, plan shipping schedules accordingly.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Decal Installation & Application Guide

Proper installation technique ensures your transfer decals apply smoothly and adhere permanently to target surfaces. Following correct application steps prevents bubbles, wrinkles, and alignment issues.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with soap and water, then wipe with rubbing alcohol to remove all dirt, oils, and residue. Allow the surface to dry completely before beginning transfer decal application. Smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, metal, and painted surfaces provide the best adhesion for long-term performance.

Applying the Transfer Decal

Remove the paper backing from your transfer decal while keeping the transfer tape in place. Position the decal carefully on your target surface, as repositioning becomes difficult once contact is made. Use a squeegee or application tool to press the transfer decal firmly, working from center outward to eliminate air bubbles.

Removing Transfer Tape

After confirming complete adhesion, slowly peel away the transfer tape at a sharp angle. If any vinyl elements lift with the tape, press them back down and continue removal more slowly. The transfer decal should remain perfectly positioned on your surface with clean edges and complete adhesion.

For optimal results, avoid application in direct sunlight or extreme temperatures. Consider application environment when planning installation of transfer decals alongside other custom elements like custom clear roll labels for coordinated branding projects.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Transfer Decals?

Transfer decals are precision-cut vinyl graphics that use transfer tape for clean application without background material. Made from durable vinyl film, transfer decals are commonly used for vehicle graphics, business signage, product labeling, and promotional displays. The transfer cutting process removes excess vinyl around your design, leaving only the intended graphics, text, or logos. Professional transfer tape holds individual design elements in perfect alignment during application, allowing complex multi-piece designs to be applied as a single unit onto glass, metal, painted surfaces, and other smooth substrates.

Order Custom Transfer Decals for Professional Applications

Ready to create professional transfer decals for your business, vehicle, or promotional needs? Our precision cutting technology and premium vinyl materials ensure your custom graphics apply cleanly and perform reliably in both indoor and outdoor environments. Choose from flexible production options, upload your artwork or use our design tools, and receive transfer decals cut exactly to your specifications.

Start designing your custom transfer decals today with our online configurator, or contact our customer service team for assistance with complex projects or special requirements. Fast turnaround options and professional-grade materials make it easy to get high-quality transfer decals for any application timeline.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Decal FAQs

What surfaces work best for transfer decals?

Transfer decals adhere best to smooth, clean, non-porous surfaces like glass, metal, painted surfaces, and high-quality plastics. They work excellently on vehicle paint, windows, equipment, products, and interior walls with smooth finishes.

How long do transfer decals last outdoors?

Quality transfer decals made from premium vinyl typically last 5-7 years outdoors when properly applied to suitable surfaces. Indoor applications can last significantly longer due to reduced UV exposure and weather conditions.

What file format works best for transfer decal cutting?

Vector files in Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF format produce the best cutting results for transfer decals. These formats provide precise cut lines and maintain quality at any size, ensuring clean edges and accurate weeding.

Can transfer decals be removed without damaging surfaces?

Transfer decals can be removed from most surfaces using heat and proper technique, though removal success depends on surface type, application age, and environmental exposure. Gentle heating helps soften the adhesive for easier removal.

What is the minimum text size for transfer decals?

Text must be at least 1/2 inch tall for reliable cutting and weeding in transfer decal production. Characters and design elements should maintain 1/8 inch minimum spacing and stroke width to ensure successful application.

How does transfer tape work with complex designs?

Transfer tape holds individual cut pieces of your design in perfect alignment during application, allowing multi-element graphics, detailed logos, and text combinations to be applied as a single unit onto your target surface.

What cutting options are available for transfer decals?

Transfer decals use precision cutting that removes excess vinyl material around and within your design. The cutting process includes up to 8 standard picks per design, with additional picks available for more intricate graphics.
